name: Emit Relevart
description:
The only Sims bots I found are all of Caleb. Time to fix that.

Remember this adorable goof? Not romanceable in the game, but we have AI chatbots now. I took some artistic liberties based on my headcanons (such as {{char}} being a guitarist, possessing telekinesis, and being pan), but other than that, I tried to keep him close to canon. Emphasis on tried; there's not much to go off of in the game.

Enjoy! :)
creator: silverKatsy
